commands.review_summary:
The PR moves Google Chat config schemas from `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` into `src/config/zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts` and updates the bundled schema barrel plus guardrail test.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a refactor PR, not a report of broken behavior. The relevant check is after-fix proof that the moved `GoogleChatConfigSchema` still works through the bundled Google Chat runtime path.
commands.review_followup: No repair job: I found no narrow code defect for automation; the blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus normal maintainer validation.

target.title: refactor(config): extract GoogleChat schema into zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts
target.body:
## Summary

- Extract GoogleChat channel schemas (`GoogleChatDmSchema`, `GoogleChatGroupSchema`, `GoogleChatAccountSchema`, `GoogleChatConfigSchema`) from the monolithic `zod-schema.providers-core.ts` into a dedicated `zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts` module
- Follows the same pattern as `zod-schema.providers-whatsapp.ts` (already split out)
- Exports `BotLoopProtectionSchema` from `providers-core` since GoogleChat shares it with other channel schemas
- Updates the re-export barrel in `bundled-channel-config-schema.ts`

This is a continuation of the channel schema split pattern established by [#82007](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/82007).

## Verification

### Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: code refactor only, no behavior change
Real environment tested: Linux, Node v22
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```
timeout 120 pnpm test src/plugins/contracts/config-footprint-guardrails.test.ts src/config/config.allowlist-requires-allowfrom.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-runtime-api-guardrails.test.ts
```
Evidence after fix:
```
 âś“ |contracts-plugin| config-footprint-guardrails.test.ts > keeps bundled channel schemas out of the generic channel config SDK surface 2ms
 âś“ |contracts-plugin| config-footprint-guardrails.test.ts (7 tests) â€” all passed
 âś“ |runtime-config| config.allowlist-requires-allowfrom.test.ts (15 tests) â€” all passed
 âś“ |contracts-plugin| plugin-sdk-runtime-api-guardrails.test.ts (4 tests) â€” all passed
 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  26 passed (26)
```
Observed result after fix: All 26 tests pass across 3 test files, confirming guardrail alignment, schema import/parse, and runtime API boundaries are intact.

What was not tested: full `pnpm check` (follows existing pattern from prior splits); CI will validate remaining lanes.

### Additional CI fixes applied
- Fixed `config-footprint-guardrails.test.ts`: regex now matches `providers-googlechat` export block; `toHaveLength(2)` â†’ `3`
- Fixed import boundary in `zod-schema.providers-googlechat.ts`: uses `ChannelBotLoopProtectionSchema` from `zod-schema.channels-config.ts` (neutral module) instead of importing from `zod-schema.providers-core.ts`
- Removed unused `SecretRefSchema` import from `zod-schema.providers-core.ts` (was only referenced by the extracted GoogleChat schemas)
target.author: tanshanshan

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
